en_body:
You return, your image appearing in the wineglass-depth
Love's ferment drunken with wine sweetly mild and burning
Ancient verses swoon beneath the new moon season
Love newly enthroned, our lovely fingers long entwined
Touching so lightly the tender down shivering into rapture
Night wildly drunken upon lips rippling a fragrant kiss
Your music springs the Love-chord, languidly sweet
Within a dreaming night filled with rose-colored dreams!
